chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 674 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2691/2022 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 08.11.2022 None present for the petitioner. Through instant Petition, the petitioner has sought directions to respondent No.4 regarding not showing the bids of the petitioner in BERs. The appropriate remedy is available to the petitioner under SPPRA Rules, 2010, hence this petition is dismissed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
